prompt: A full-color manga page in the style of a dramatic sports manga, showing an intense soccer match inside a huge domed stadium packed with a blue-and-white crowd. Use sharp ink lines, dense crosshatching, screentone texture, dynamic speed lines, and vivid anime coloring as if a black-and-white manga page has been professionally colorized. The composition is a single page with 3 panels: 1 large main panel covering most of the page, plus 2 narrow diagonal inset panels stacked along the left side. In the main panel, show a steeply tilted wide-angle view of the penalty area and goal from an elevated sideline perspective, with the green grass stretched by perspective and filled with directional hatching. Count 6 visible players in the main panel: 4 blue-uniform players and 2 white-uniform players, plus 1 goalkeeper in yellow at the goal. The most prominent player is seen from behind in the lower center-right wearing a blue jersey with “HUGO” and the number 9, running toward the play with one arm extended. Near him on the lower right edge, show another player in a white jersey labeled “ISAGI” with the number 11, also running forward. In the midground, show 4 more field players contesting the ball: 3 in blue and 1 in white, with one white-uniform player diving or lunging horizontally from the right toward the center. The goal stands near the top center-left, with the yellow goalkeeper bracing in front of the net. Add 3 speech bubbles in the main panel, large white manga balloons with hand-lettered uppercase English text: “BUT I WANT TO WIN THE WORLD CUP...”, “...AS THE SECOND-BEST AND AS A MID-FIELDER.”, and “...THE WORLD RECORD FOR MOST TIMES WINNING THE WORLD CUP...”. In the left-side inset area, create 2 diagonal panels. The upper inset panel shows a close-up of a dark-haired character in blue, partly obscured by a soft rectangular blur over the center of the face and torso area, with a small speech bubble that says, “YOICHI ISAGI, DID YOU KNOW...”. The lower inset panel shows a close-up of a reddish-haired character with a wide blue eye, sweat on the face, and a pale blue background, looking surprised or stunned. Maintain bold black panel borders, dramatic foreshortening, and a high-energy tournament atmosphere. Use a blue, green, white, and yellow palette with strong contrast and authentic manga-page coloring aesthetics.
translatedPrompt: 一张全彩漫画页面，采用戏剧性的体育漫画风格，展示了大型穹顶体育场内激烈的足球比赛，观众席呈现蓝白配色。使用锐利的墨线、密集的排线、网点纸纹理、动态速度线以及生动的动漫配色，呈现出黑白漫画页面经过专业上色的效果。构图为单页 3 分镜：1 个占据页面大部分空间的大型主分镜，以及左侧堆叠的 2 个狭窄对角线嵌入式分镜。在主分镜中，展示从高处边线视角俯瞰的禁区和球门，呈现陡峭倾斜的广角视野，绿茵草地因透视而拉伸，并布满方向性排线。主分镜中可见 6 名球员：4 名身穿蓝色球衣的球员，2 名身穿白色球衣的球员，以及球门前 1 名身穿黄色球衣的守门员。最显眼的球员位于右下中心，背对镜头，身穿印有“HUGO”和数字 9 的蓝色球衣，单臂伸展向比赛区域奔跑。在他右下边缘附近，展示另一名身穿印有“ISAGI”和数字 11 的白色球衣的球员，同样在向前奔跑。在中景处，展示另外 4 名争抢球权的场上球员：3 名蓝色球衣和 1 名白色球衣，其中一名白色球衣球员正从右侧向中心水平俯冲或扑救。球门位于左上方中心附近，黄色守门员在网前严阵以待。在主分镜中添加 3 个对话气泡，即带有手写体大写英文文本的大型白色漫画气泡，内容分别为：“BUT I WANT TO WIN THE WORLD CUP...”、“...AS THE SECOND-BEST AND AS A MID-FIELDER.”以及“...THE WORLD RECORD FOR MOST TIMES WINNING THE WORLD CUP...”。在左侧嵌入区域，创建 2 个对角线分镜。上方嵌入分镜展示一名身穿蓝色球衣的黑发角色特写，脸部和躯干中心部分被柔和的矩形模糊遮挡，配有一个写着“YOICHI ISAGI, DID YOU KNOW...”的小对话气泡。下方嵌入分镜展示一名红发角色的特写，拥有一只巨大的蓝色眼睛，脸上带着汗水，背景为淡蓝色，表情显得惊讶或震惊。保持粗黑的分镜边框、戏剧性的透视缩短效果以及高能量的锦标赛氛围。使用蓝色、绿色、白色和黄色的配色方案，并具备强烈的对比度和地道的漫画页面上色美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 彩色足球漫画页面：该提示词可生成一张极具张力的全彩体育漫画页面，包含倾斜的体育场足球场景、嵌入式特写分镜以及醒目的对话气泡，非常适合漫画上色测试或动漫风格的漫画创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
